replies.msg: 有冇啲具體啲嘅事？

我有個朋友之前失戀咗幾年，但自從一年前養咗隻狗同隻兔仔之後，愛情運越來越好，之後佢去玩塔羅占卜嗰陣，個占卜師話原來佢兩隻寵物嘅星座旺佢嘅星座，仲講仲咗佢男朋友嘅職業同埋家景富裕，話今年會結婚，結果真係三個星期前結咗婚，仲去埋巴里渡蜜月... 真係而加先知原來養寵物都可以改運，犀利! 我個朋友本身都好鐘意寵物，但知道咗旺佢之後更加錫哂佢地🤣

咁啱我又睇咗呢個video，裡面嗰個係真係專業占星師:
https://youtu.be/Qf8or0P4aZM

你不防都試下啦😊

replies.msg: 但我仍然中意佢
曾精彩過願挽留 年年月月逝去越是覺得深愛你

I have a friend named Eddie who's in a similar situation as you. He has been having a crush on this girl named Judy for seven years. He's still holding out false hope that one day he'll become her boyfriend but Judy has a boyfriend. He's just being a doormat. During their trip to Thailand, Eddie bought her lots of presents and keepsakes and paid for all her meals but at the end he ran out of money and so had to ask her to lend him some money who's now saying that Eddie is staying close to her to take advantage of her and her money. They stayed in a twin room which has a pair of twin beds rather than a double bed. She told him that she wouldn't sleep with any guy until she was married which we all know isn't true; she sleeps with her real boyfriend daily. Eddie knew it wasn't true but didn't mind. She even said to him twice that she was a bit attracted to him which gave her false hope. That's why he's still holding out false hope that very soon he'll become her boyfriend. Recently, she demanded that Eddie bought her a Gucci limited edition handbag which he did. It was twenty seven thousand dollars. He was very upset after he found out Judy was taking advantage of him and his money. Another girl who he fancied named Susan took him to a beauty parlour and sold him facial sessions for over twelve thousand dollars. Eddie didn't know he was being taken advantage of until he made his payment on his credit card. As soon as he made the payment Susan's whole manner changed. Her expression looked immediately different as she got what she wanted already. She pretended to be cute and said "We can do facials together sweetheart" then he got persuaded. Eddie got rejected my so many girls maybe due to the fact that he as no qualifications whatsoever so he ended up working as a security guard in a residential building with little career prospect. He fancied my sister so she avoided him. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exam and failed them again in his resits so he couldn't apply for a student visa again. He ended up working as a security guard in a residential building whose salary is twelve thousand dollars a month. Recently he said he wanted to take a shot at the CPA exam and become an accountant with better career prospects. It'll improve his job prospects but the next day he said it would be a waste of time if he failed it so he gave up. The problem is he doesn't want to step out of his comfort zone; he'd rather be an ordinary security guard for the rest of his life. In addition, he's extremely thin; he's 180 centimetres tall but weighs less than 110 pounds. I suggested he gain weight but he didn't listen. I tried to encourage him but to no effect. Judy and Susan must have swept him off his feet many years ago.
My friend eddie is in the same situation as you. He is invited to a marathon but he may be out of condition for it.

quote.msg: I have a friend named Eddie who's in a similar situation as you. He has been having a crush on this girl named Judy for seven years. He's still holding out false hope that one day he'll become her boyfriend but Judy has a boyfriend. He's just being a doormat. During their trip to Thailand, Eddie bought her lots of presents and keepsakes and paid for all her meals but at the end he ran out of money and so had to ask her to lend him some money who's now saying that Eddie is staying close to her to take advantage of her and her money. They stayed in a twin room which has a pair of twin beds rather than a double bed. She told him that she wouldn't sleep with any guy until she was married which we all know isn't true; she sleeps with her real boyfriend daily. Eddie knew it wasn't true but didn't mind. She even said to him twice that she was a bit attracted to him which gave her false hope. That's why he's still holding out false hope that very soon he'll become her boyfriend. Recently, she demanded that Eddie bought her a Gucci limited edition handbag which he did. It was twenty seven thousand dollars. He was very upset after he found out Judy was taking advantage of him and his money. Another girl who he fancied named Susan took him to a beauty parlour and sold him facial sessions for over twelve thousand dollars. Eddie didn't know he was being taken advantage of until he made his payment on his credit card. As soon as he made the payment Susan's whole manner changed. Her expression looked immediately different as she got what she wanted already. She pretended to be cute and said "We can do facials together sweetheart" then he got persuaded. Eddie got rejected my so many girls maybe due to the fact that he as no qualifications whatsoever so he ended up working as a security guard in a residential building with little career prospect. He fancied my sister so she avoided him. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exam and failed them again in his resits so he couldn't apply for a student visa again. He ended up working as a security guard in a residential building whose salary is twelve thousand dollars a month. Recently he said he wanted to take a shot at the CPA exam and become an accountant with better career prospects. It'll improve his job prospects but the next day he said it would be a waste of time if he failed it so he gave up. The problem is he doesn't want to step out of his comfort zone; he'd rather be an ordinary security guard for the rest of his life. In addition, he's extremely thin; he's 180 centimetres tall but weighs less than 110 pounds. I suggested he gain weight but he didn't listen. I tried to encourage him but to no effect. Judy and Susan must have swept him off his feet many years ago.
